examples.title: Pseudocode: Forward Chaining
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ForwardChaining
INPUT: ruleBase, workingMemory
OUTPUT: updated workingMemory

BEGIN
 WHILE workingMemory has changed
 FOR EACH rule in ruleBase
 IF rule's conditions are met in workingMemory
 THEN add rule's conclusion to workingMemory
 RETURN workingMemory
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the forward chaining algorithm, which starts with the available data in the working memory and uses the rules to derive new data until no more rules are triggered.

examples.title: Python: Forward Chaining
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates the forward chaining algorithm, which starts with the available data in the working memory and uses the rules to derive new data until no more rules are triggered.

examples.title: Python: Backward Chaining
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates the backward chaining algorithm, which starts with a hypothesized goal and checks if the conditions of the rules are met.
